style: 占位图风格：纯色块 + 文字标签。所有资源使用 Cocos Creator 内置 Sprite（纯色）和 Label 组件实现，不依赖外部图片文件。prompt_hint 字段为后续 AI 生图预留，本轮不使用。

assets.description: 主菜单背景，深蓝色全屏纯色，营造夜晚安静氛围
assets.prompt_hint: dark blue night sky background, soft gradient, calm peaceful atmosphere, minimal stars, mobile game UI background, flat illustration style

assets.description: 房间背景，浅米色全屏纯色，代表温馨的婴儿房
assets.prompt_hint: cozy baby nursery room interior, warm beige walls, soft lighting, nightstand beside crib, window with curtains, top-down 2D flat illustration, pastel colors, cute cartoon style

assets.description: 婴儿床，深棕色矩形色块，屏幕下半部居中，宽250高80
assets.prompt_hint: cute baby crib top view, wooden frame, white bedding, small pillow, flat 2D illustration, cartoon style, pastel colors

assets.description: 宝宝安睡状态，用 😴 表情文字占位。后续替换为Q版宝宝闭眼安睡的4帧循环动画
assets.prompt_hint: cute cartoon baby sleeping peacefully, closed eyes, small smile, wrapped in blanket, chibi style, soft pastel colors, transparent background

assets.description: 宝宝不安状态，用 😟 表情文字占位。后续替换为Q版宝宝皱眉翻身的动画
assets.prompt_hint: cute cartoon baby slightly disturbed, frowning, tossing in sleep, chibi style, soft pastel colors, transparent background

assets.description: 宝宝痛苦状态，用 😫 表情文字占位。后续替换为Q版宝宝即将哭醒的表情
assets.prompt_hint: cute cartoon baby about to cry, eyes squeezed shut, mouth trembling, chibi style, soft pastel colors, transparent background

assets.description: 宝宝哭醒状态，用 😭 表情文字占位。后续替换为Q版宝宝大哭的动画
assets.prompt_hint: cute cartoon baby crying loudly, tears streaming, mouth wide open, chibi style, soft pastel colors, transparent background

assets.description: 手机事件节点，蓝色矩形140x160 + 📱文字 + '长按'提示。后续替换为手机震动的帧动画
assets.prompt_hint: cartoon smartphone vibrating, screen glowing, motion lines around it, flat 2D illustration, cute style, transparent background

assets.description: 闹钟事件节点，红色矩形140x140 + ⏰文字 + '点击'提示。后续替换为闹钟震动的帧动画
